title: Matt's Core Message
content: Matt Raynor is an AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer who builds production-grade software — agentic AI systems with LangChain and Claude, computer vision pipelines with TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe, and full-stack platforms with React 19 and Django. He has four production applications live and is freelancing while seeking a full-time remote role. Try his AI shopping assistant at store.matthewraynor.com.

title: Engineering Philosophy
content: Matt's engineering approach is methodical — he plans deeply, breaks down problems clearly, and designs systems that scale. He specializes in taking complex real-world processes and transforming them into clean, reliable, user-friendly software. His work ranges from agentic AI assistants to enterprise computer vision to logistics platforms. He builds better than most — and his portfolio proves it.

title: Technical Message
content: Matt builds with LangChain, Claude, TensorFlow.js, MediaPipe, OpenCV, MiDaS, React 19, TypeScript, Django REST Framework, and modern cloud infrastructure. His production projects include an agentic AI shopping assistant, an enterprise computer vision pipeline for IDP Americas, ML-powered wall visualization, a full-stack luxury delivery platform (ToteTaxi), and an operations platform for fine art logistics (Eric Art Mover). Everything he builds is production-deployed and battle-tested.

title: Spiritual Message
content: Matt is a practitioner of SGI Nichiren Buddhism, a student of Taoism, and a member of AA. His spiritual practice informs his work ethic and creative approach. He believes in presence over performance, growth without attachment, and building things that genuinely help people.

title: Background
content: Matt is a former commercial fisherman from Long Island who became a quadriplegic after a diving accident. He taught himself to code, and now builds production AI systems and full-stack applications. He lives independently in Hampton Bays, NY, works as a freelance developer, and is actively pursuing a full-time remote AI engineering role.

title: One-Line Summary
content: Matt Raynor is a freelance AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer with four live production applications, based in Hampton Bays, NY, seeking a full-time remote role. Try his AI shopping assistant at store.matthewraynor.com.
